questions.question: Where is Alameda?
expected_answers: Alameda is a city located in Alameda County, California, on Alameda Island in the San Francisco Bay.
Alameda is in the San Francisco Bay Area of California, situated between Oakland and the San Francisco Bay.
Alameda is a coastal city in Northern California, west of Oakland and south of Berkeley.

questions.question: Where is San Mateo?
expected_answers: San Mateo is a city located in San Mateo County, California, on the San Francisco Peninsula.
San Mateo is in the Bay Area of California, south of San Francisco and north of Palo Alto.
San Mateo is situated between San Francisco and Silicon Valley along the western shore of the San Francisco Bay.
